Emde Layout Demos › Home

Hello

I'm a designer and developer based in Prague. I build tools that help people create things on the web.

Currently working on open-source static site tooling and exploring the intersection of design systems and developer experience.

When not coding, I'm probably hiking somewhere in the Bohemian countryside or experimenting with fermented foods.
